info.english_meaning: to be confused to lose senses to act weird
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' vimohanam = vyAkulIkaraRam ' iti kzIrasvAmI  ' gArDye luByati mohArTe tudAderluBatIti Se ' (Slo. 141) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'EkzavyO viDftI nedbarhiSca prastaraSca saMluByAtaH' (Sa॰brA॰3.4.1.18) na saMluByAtaH=saMlubDe Akule vyAmiSre na BavataH
'saMloBayanto duritA padAni' (aTarva॰6.28.1) duritAni padAni =duritanimittAni padAni (kapotasya) saMloBayantaH=vyAkulIkurvantaH pramArjayanta ityarTaH fksaMhitAyAM tu saMyopayanta iti pAWaH saYjyAyAn
'sADuviBaktA no lokAstAnna SakzyAmaH saMloBayitum' (jE0 brA0 1155) saMloBayitumAkulIkartum
'smara yAvanna viloByase divi' (ku0 420) viloByase garDyase Akfzyase
'samIpavAsena viloBitAste' (BA0 vana0 1769) viloBitA vimohitA budDiviBramaM gamitAH
'daDadviluBitaM vAtEH kesaraM vahnipiNgam' (Bawwi0 94) viluBitaM paryAkulIkftam viluBitaH sImantaH AkulIkfta ityarTaH viluBitAni padAni
'yo va etadatikrAmAd ya AluloBayizAditi' (E0 BA0 47) AloBo Brama iti zaqguruSizyaH BramayitumicCedityarTaH
